caption: The video displays a static screen of a terminal or text editor showing configuration files and log entries. The text is white and gray against a black background. Legible text includes configuration parameters such as "local.443", "Merge_Log_Key", and "KBS.Logging.Enable on", along with a section for "output-loki.conf" detailing "name", "host", and "labels_keys". The right side of the screen shows log entries starting with "printail_1" and containing timestamps like "t2020-10-28T06:21:35.27428220Z". Further down, a section for "parsers.conf" is visible, containing "format regex" and "Time_Key". A status bar at the bottom shows timestamps such as "02:11:22" and "02:11:18". Across all frames, the screen content remains completely unchanged, showing no movement, scrolling, or changes in the displayed text or interface.
